title: Nice, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Nice, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Nice is a city in Provence-Alpes-Côte d’Azur with a population of 343,000. The jewel of the French Riviera with a stunning Mediterranean coastline, Belle Époque architecture, and a glamorous promenade.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
